prompt: Professional medical illustration: A futuristic digital brain cross-section showing subarachnoid hemorrhage blood volume (SAHV) with mathematical volumetric measurements overlaid in glowing blue data visualizations. A modern CT scanner on the left side. Global network connections radiating outward connecting to hospital icons across continents, representing international collaboration. Clean medical aesthetic with deep blues, whites, and subtle red for blood. Scientific, precise, hope-inspiring, cutting-edge technology. High-end medical journal cover style.
